news.title: 特朗普要求伊朗“无条件投降”
news.title0: Trump demands 'unconditional surrender' from Iran as Putin speaks with Iran's president
news.content: 美国总统特朗普要求伊朗“无条件投降”，并称将在伊朗选出“可接受”的新领导人后助其重建。
news.content0: US President Donald Trump has demanded Iran's "unconditional surrender" as the American and Israeli military continued to launch strikes.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美移民官枪杀本国公民视频曝光
news.title0: Footage shows US citizen shot by ICE agent in Texas traffic stop
news.content: 新公布的执法记录仪视频显示，一名美国公民在得州交通检查站被移民与海关执法局官员开枪击毙的混乱过程。
news.content0: Newly released body camera footage shows the chaotic moments leading up to the fatal shooting of a US citizen by an immigration officer in Texas last year, which only recently came to light.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美轰炸机降落英国基地准备打击伊朗
news.title0: US lands bomber at UK air base after warning of surge in strikes on Iran
news.content: 一架可携带24枚巡航导弹的美国B-1轰炸机降落在英国空军基地，此前英国首相批准美军使用英基地对伊朗进行“防御性”打击。
news.content0: A US bomber capable of carrying 24 cruise missiles has landed in the UK after Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer approved "defensive" US action against Iranian missile sites from UK bases.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 乌克兰战场出现武装机器人
news.title0: Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine war
news.content: 乌克兰军队大规模部署武装无人地面车辆，用于执行攻击、侦察和后勤任务，标志着地面战进入新阶段。
news.content0: Since the start of Russia's full-scale invasion, the war in Ukraine has developed into a high-tech conflict.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 英国知名啤酒品牌Brewdog破产
news.title0: From a £1bn dream to a brutal collapse: How Brewdog hit the rocks
news.content: 曾估值10亿英镑的英国精酿啤酒巨头Brewdog因扩张过快、财务困境而进入破产管理程序，数百名员工被裁。
news.content0: "All self-respecting captains go down with their ships," James Watt declared in his finance memoir Business for Punks in 2015.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 世界最稀有狮子在动物园去世
news.title0: Two of the world's rarest lions put to sleep at zoo
news.content: 贝尔法斯特动物园两只22岁的巴巴里狮姐妹因健康原因被实施安乐死，该亚种已在野外灭绝。
news.content0: Two of the world's rarest lions have died at a zoo.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 塔利班新法令允许丈夫殴打妻子
news.title0: Taliban allows men to beat their wives as long as they don’t break bones or leave open wounds
news.content: 阿富汗塔利班当局颁布法令，允许丈夫殴打妻子，只要不造成骨折或留下明显持久伤痕，并将鸡奸定为死罪。
news.content0: Taliban authorities in Afghanistan have issued a draconian decree that makes sodomy punishable by death and allows men to beat their wives so long as they don’t break bones or leave visible, lasting wounds.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 慕尼黑冲浪者因人工浪消失而抗争
news.title0: Surfers in Munich (Yes, Munich) Just Want Their Wave Back
news.content: 德国慕尼黑市中心一条河流上的人工冲浪浪点因障碍物被移除而消失，当地冲浪爱好者正努力试图恢复它。
news.content0: Ignoring the winter freeze seeping down from the Alps, two men shed their parkas one recent morning, squirmed into wet suits and walked into a raging creek in downtown Munich. A helper handed them a 20-foot metal bar, which the men shoved underwater.
news.author: NYTimes

news.title: 英国索厄姆谋杀案凶手狱中身亡
news.title0: Soham murderer Ian Huntley dies after prison attack
news.content: 因谋杀两名女童而被判终身监禁的英国罪犯伊恩·亨特利在监狱内遭袭击后，于医院死亡。
news.content0: Soham murderer Ian Huntley has died following a prison assault.
news.author: Sky News
